name: Borreload Liberator Dragon
name_jp: ヴァレルロード・<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｌ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>リベレイター</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>・ドラゴン
desc:
3+ Effect Monsters
You can only Special Summon "Borreload Liberator Dragon(s)" once per turn. Once per turn, during the Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can place 1 monster your opponent controls in a zone this card points to and take control of it. Your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to this effect's activation. Once per Chain, if this card is in your GY (Quick Effect): You can target 1 monster you control; destroy it, and if you do, Special Summon this card.
mnst_eff:
3+ Effect Monsters

eff:
3+ Effect Monsters
You can only Special Summon "Borreload Liberator Dragon(s)" once per turn. Once per turn, during the Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can place 1 monster your opponent controls in a zone this card points to and take control of it. Your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to this effect's activation. Once per Chain, if this card is in your GY (Quick Effect): You can target 1 monster you control; destroy it, and if you do, Special Summon this card.

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Requires Effect Monsters as Link Materials
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
